prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约4383→3251→2696→4265名。2022至2024年位次持续前移（竞争加剧），但2025年因宁夏高考从'理科'改为'物理类'模式，位次大幅后移至4265名，较2024年后移约1569名，属模式切换带来的结构性波动。2025年基准位次约4265名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年38人、2023年40人、2024年40人、2025年42人、2026年42人。2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第49名（2025年第52名、2024年第59名），近年排名稳中有升，体现学校综合实力持续增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，抖音热度排名第94（一般），未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；2026年声誉文件无该校直接记录，整体舆情平稳；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，均为该校王牌学科；招生专业中交通运输类、土木工程等直接对应优势学科，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等专业社会热度持续偏高；土木建筑类热度分化观望。宁夏2026年高考总人数约6.6万人（较2025年约6.59万人基本持平），物理类估算约4.46万人，考生规模稳定；西南交通大学位于四川成都，属西南地区；宁夏考生跨省报考，该校在宁夏招生占比极小（约42人/全省物理类4.4万人），地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因模式切换大幅后移、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名小幅提升及考生规模稳定等因素，预计2026年物理类位次将较2025年略有前移（竞争略加剧），但不会回到2024年水平。预测最低位次约4215名，区间3715–4715名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 4383 → 3251 → 2696 → 4265. Rankings moved forward continuously from 2022 to 2024 (increased competition), but in 2025, due to Ningxia's college entrance exam changing from 'Science' to 'Physics Category' mode, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 4265, about 1569 places behind 2024, a structural fluctuation caused by mode switching. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4265; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for Science/Physics Category: 38 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 40 in 2024, 42 in 2025, and 42 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking rose to 49th in 2026 (52nd in 2025, 59th in 2024), showing a steady increase in recent years, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 94 (average), no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; the 2026 reputation file has no direct record for this university, overall public opinion is stable; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, both are flagship disciplines; among the enrollment majors, Transportation, Civil Engineering, etc., directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science continue to have high social popularity; Civil Architecture categories have divided and wait-and-see popularity. The total number of Ningxia college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 66,000 (basically the same as about 65,900 in 2025), with an estimated 44,600 in the Physics Category, a stable candidate pool; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the Southwest region; Ningxia candidates apply across provinces, and the university's enrollment share in Ningxia is very small (about 42 out of 44,000 Physics Category candidates in the province), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings due to mode switching, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight rise in Soft Science ranking, and stable candidate numbers, it is expected that the Physics Category ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (slightly increased competition), but will not return to the 2024 level. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4215, with a range of 3715–4715.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3715–4715, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Communication, Transportation) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Transportation (A+ discipline) and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) are the most competitive major combinations at this university.

The university is strong in engineering, with a small scale of liberal arts programs, leading to relatively stable application enthusiasm.
